Appearances:
Plaintiff Brad Drian is present. Represented by John Tunik.
Attorney Brenda Cruz Keith appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Saudy Sanchez is present.
Attorney Ashley E. Littlefield representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem James Watson, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case did NOT settle. The trial date of APR-23-2012 remains on calendar.
